title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 1971 (11.11.1971)
text: REGISTERED No. D. 221 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 207] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 24,1971/AGRAHAYANA 3, 1893 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the nth November 1971 G.S.R. 1783.—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Pass- ports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the follow- ing rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Third Amendment) Rules, 1971. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st day of December, 1971. 2. In the Passports Rules, 1967,— (i) in sub-rule (1) of rule 10 for the words "three years", the words "five years" shall be substituted, (ii) in Schedule V, ( I I 2 I ) -- 1 of 4 -- 1122 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART I I - (a) for Sl. 1 to 3 and the entries relating thereto the following shall be substituted, namely: — SI. No. "\. 2. "3. (b) Particulars of application Ordinary Passport with a maximum ini- tial validity of five years. Renewal of Ordinary Passport. Issue of a duplicate, passport in lieu of the Ordinary Passport on the ground that it has been lost, stolen, damaged, destroyed or for any other such reason. for Sl. No. 10 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substitu- ted, namely:— "10 (i) Additional endorsement or miscel- laneous service on an Ordinary Passport. (ii) Adding supplementary booklet, when all the pages in an existing " Ordinary Passport are used up. (iii) Additional endorsement or miscel- laneous service on an Emergency Certificate or a Certificate of Iden- tity. Scale of fees .. Rs. 25/-" . Rs. 25/- for five years or Rs. 5/- per year or part thereof." .. Rs. 25/-" .. Rs. 3/- per service. .. Rs. W- .. Rs. 2/-." [No. VI/401/8/71.] P. N. MENON, Secy. -- 2 of 4 -- SEC. 3(i)] THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY 1123 FRUITED BY THE GENERAL MANAOTH, GOVERNMENT OF IHDIA PBEft.
